arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bucket

creationDate.title: Creation Date
creationDate.description: The date when the bucket was created

instanceType.title: Instance Type
instanceType.description: The type of the EC2 instance (e.g., t2.micro, m5.large)

state.title: State
state.description: The current state of the instance

publicIpAddress.title: Public IP Address
publicIpAddress.description: The public IP address of the EC2 instance

privateIpAddress.title: Private IP Address
privateIpAddress.description: The private IP address of the EC2 instance

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags associated with the EC2 instance

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 instance

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the ECS cluster

runningTasksCount.title: Running Tasks Count
runningTasksCount.description: The number of running tasks in the cluster

activeServicesCount.title: Active Services Count
activeServicesCount.description: The number of active services in the cluster

pendingTasksCount.title: Pending Tasks Count
pendingTasksCount.description: The number of pending tasks in the cluster

registeredContainerInstancesCount.title: Registered Container Instances Count
registeredContainerInstancesCount.description: The number of registered container instances in the cluster

capacityProviders.title: Capacity Providers
capacityProviders.description: The capacity providers associated with the cluster

clusterArn.title: ARN
clusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster

name.title: Project Name
name.description: The name of the CodeBuild project

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CodeBuild project

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of the CodeBuild project

serviceRole.title: Service Role
serviceRole.description: The ARN of the AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) service role

timeoutInMinutes.title: Timeout (Minutes)
timeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, from 5 to 480, for AWS CodeBuild to wait before timing out any related build

queuedTimeoutInMinutes.title: Queued Timeout (Minutes)
queuedTimeoutInMinutes.description: The number of minutes a build is allowed to be queued before timing out

encryptionKey.title: Encryption Key
encryptionKey.description: The AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer master key (CMK) to be used for encrypting the build project artifacts

environment.title: Build Environment
environment.description: Information about the build environment for the build project

source.title: Source
source.description: Information about the build input source code for the build project

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: Information about the build output artifacts for the build project

created.title: Created
created.description: When the build project was created

lastModified.title: Last Modified
lastModified.description: When the build project was last modified

projectVisibility.title: Project Visibility
projectVisibility.description: The visibility setting for the project

concurrentBuildLimit.title: Concurrent Build Limit
concurrentBuildLimit.description: The maximum number of concurrent builds that are allowed for this project

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags associated with the CodeBuild project

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the build run

projectName.title: Project Name
projectName.description: The name of the CodeBuild project

buildStatus.title: Build Status
buildStatus.description: The current status of the build

currentPhase.title: Current Phase
currentPhase.description: The current phase of the build

sourceVersion.title: Source Version
sourceVersion.description: The version of the source code

initiator.title: Initiator
initiator.description: The entity that initiated the build
